import { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSeparator, InputOTPSlot } from '@gentleduck/registry-ui/input-otp'

export default function InputOtpRtlDemo() {
  return (
    <InputOTP maxLength={6} dir="rtl">
      <InputOTPGroup>
        <InputOTPSlot />
        <InputOTPSlot />
        <InputOTPSlot />
      </InputOTPGroup>
      <InputOTPSeparator />
      <InputOTPGroup>
        <InputOTPSlot />
        <InputOTPSlot />
        <InputOTPSlot />
      </InputOTPGroup>
    </InputOTP>
  )
}
